module-3-clean-release-snapshot.label: Module Project: Clean the Volunteer Hub Repository
module-3-clean-release-snapshot.summary: Continue volunteer-hub and finish a clean release handoff.

try_module_3_sketch4.title: Create and Recover a README Mistake

try_module_3_sketch0.title: Rename the Signup Page
try_module_3_sketch0.prompt: Type `mkdir -p pages` and press Enter. Then type `git mv index.html pages/signup.html` and press Enter.
try_module_3_sketch0.hint: Move the tracked page through Git.

help.concept: The Module 3 project reuses the rename skill in the same cumulative repository.

try_module_3_sketch0.solutionCode:
mkdir -p pages
git mv index.html pages/signup.html
try_module_3_sketch0.instructions: Type `mkdir -p pages` and press Enter. Then type `git mv index.html pages/signup.html` and press Enter.

zoeskoul_setup_sh.content:
#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- volunteer-hub mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub git -C volunteer-hub init -q -b main git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s '# Volunteer Hub Volunteer signups and schedules. ' > volunteer-hub/README.md mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups

' > volunteer-hub/index.html mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 12px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub/notes printf %s 'Orientation: Saturday 10 AM ' > volunteer-hub/notes/schedule.txt git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Start volunteer hub' mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups and Training

' > volunteer-hub/index.html git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Add volunteer signup page' mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 24px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Add volunteer page styles'

#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- volunteer-hub mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub git -C volunteer-hub init -q -b main git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s '# Volunteer Hub Volunteer signups and schedules. ' > volunteer-hub/README.md mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups

' > volunteer-hub/index.html mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 12px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub/notes printf %s 'Orientation: Saturday 10 AM ' > volunteer-hub/notes/schedule.txt git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Start volunteer hub' mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups and Training

' > volunteer-hub/index.html git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Add volunteer signup page' mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 24px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Add volunteer page styles'

0.message: That action can discard or rewrite history. Use the safe, layer-specific workflow taught in this course.

1.message: Did you run `git mv index.html pages/signup.html`?

try_module_3_sketch1.title: Remove the Obsolete Schedule
try_module_3_sketch1.prompt: Type `git rm notes/schedule.txt` and press Enter. Then type `git diff --staged --name-status` and press Enter.
try_module_3_sketch1.hint: Remove the tracked schedule and review the staged structure.

help.concept: The rename and removal serve one release-cleanup purpose.
help.hint_1: Use git rm for the tracked note.
help.hint_2: Preserve README.md, styles.css, and the renamed page.

try_module_3_sketch1.instructions: Type `git rm notes/schedule.txt` and press Enter. Then type `git diff --staged --name-status` and press Enter.

#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- volunteer-hub mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub git -C volunteer-hub init -q -b main git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s '# Volunteer Hub Volunteer signups and schedules. Volunteer Signups

' > volunteer-hub/index.html mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 12px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub/notes printf %s 'Orientation: Saturday 10 AM ' > volunteer-hub/notes/schedule.txt git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Start volunteer hub' mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups and Training

' > volunteer-hub/index.html git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Add volunteer signup page' mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 24px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Add volunteer page styles' rm -f -- volunteer-hub/index.html mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub/pages printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups and Training

' > volunteer-hub/pages/signup.html git -C volunteer-hub add -A

try_module_3_sketch2.title: Write the Exact Ignore File
try_module_3_sketch2.prompt:
In the Explorer, create `volunteer-hub/.gitignore`. Add exactly these two lines starting on line 1:

`generated/`
`*.log`

Save it. Type `mkdir -p generated` and press Enter. Type `touch generated/preview.html` and press Enter. Type `touch debug.log` and press Enter. Then type `git status --short --ignored` and press Enter.
try_module_3_sketch2.hint: Create the exact ignore file, then create the supplied local-output paths.

help.concept: The edit is supplied exactly; the Git decision is how the ignore policy joins the release snapshot.
help.hint_1: Use exactly generated/ and *.log on separate lines.
help.hint_2: The structural cleanup must stay staged.

try_module_3_sketch2.starterCode:
# Volunteer Hub

Volunteer signups and schedules.
try_module_3_sketch2.solutionCode:
mkdir -p generated
touch generated/preview.html
touch debug.log
git status --short --ignored
try_module_3_sketch2.instructions:
In the Explorer, create `volunteer-hub/.gitignore`. Add exactly these two lines starting on line 1:

`generated/`
`*.log`

Save it. Type `mkdir -p generated` and press Enter. Type `touch generated/preview.html` and press Enter. Type `touch debug.log` and press Enter. Then type `git status --short --ignored` and press Enter.

#!/usr/bin/env bash set -eu rm -rf -- volunteer-hub mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub git -C volunteer-hub init -q -b main git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.name 'ZoeSkoul Learner' git -C volunteer-hub config --local user.email learner@zoeskoul.local mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s '# Volunteer Hub Volunteer signups and schedules. Volunteer Signups

' > volunteer-hub/index.html mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 12px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub/notes printf %s 'Orientation: Saturday 10 AM ' > volunteer-hub/notes/schedule.txt git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-01T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Start volunteer hub' mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups and Training

' > volunteer-hub/index.html git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-02T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Add volunteer signup page' mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub printf %s 'body { font-family: sans-serif; } footer { margin-top: 24px; } ' > volunteer-hub/styles.css git -C volunteer-hub add -A GIT_AUTHOR_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z GIT_COMMITTER_DATE=2026-01-03T12:00:00Z git -C volunteer-hub commit -q -m 'Add volunteer page styles' rm -f -- volunteer-hub/index.html rm -f -- volunteer-hub/notes/schedule.txt rmdir -- volunteer-hub/notes 2>/dev/null || true mkdir -p -- volunteer-hub/pages printf %s ' Volunteer Hub

Volunteer Signups and Training

' > volunteer-hub/pages/signup.html git -C volunteer-hub add -A

try_module_3_sketch3.title: Stage the Ignore Policy
try_module_3_sketch3.prompt: Type `git status --short --ignored` and press Enter. Confirm `generated/preview.html` and `debug.log` are ignored. Then type `git add .gitignore` and press Enter so the ignore policy joins the tracked cleanup.
try_module_3_sketch3.hint: Use the status view that includes ignored paths, then stage only .gitignore.

help.concept: Ignored output can stay on disk without entering the tracked release snapshot.
help.hint_1: Do not stage the generated files.
help.hint_2: The .gitignore file itself should remain trackable.

try_module_3_sketch3.instructions: Type `git status --short --ignored` and press Enter. Confirm `generated/preview.html` and `debug.log` are ignored. Then type `git add .gitignore` and press Enter so the ignore policy joins the tracked cleanup.

try_module_3_sketch4.title: Create and Recover a README Mistake
try_module_3_sketch4.prompt: Open `volunteer-hub/README.md`. Find the exact line `Volunteer signups and schedules.` and replace it with `Accidental release rewrite.` Save the file. Type `git add README.md` and press Enter. Then type `git restore --staged README.md` and press Enter, followed by `git restore README.md`. Finally, type `git diff --staged --name-status` and press Enter.
try_module_3_sketch4.hint: Make only the supplied temporary README edit, then recover that path without disturbing the intended cleanup.

help.concept: Safe layer-specific restore preserves the intended rename, removal, and ignore policy.
help.hint_1: Unstage README.md before restoring the working copy.

try_module_3_sketch4.starterCode:
# Volunteer Hub

Volunteer signups and schedules.
try_module_3_sketch4.solutionCode:
git add README.md
git restore --staged README.md
git restore README.md
git diff --staged --name-status
try_module_3_sketch4.instructions: Open `volunteer-hub/README.md`. Find the exact line `Volunteer signups and schedules.` and replace it with `Accidental release rewrite.` Save the file. Type `git add README.md` and press Enter. Then type `git restore --staged README.md` and press Enter, followed by `git restore README.md`. Finally, type `git diff --staged --name-status` and press Enter.

try_module_3_sketch5.title: Commit and Verify the Volunteer Hub Handoff
try_module_3_sketch5.prompt: Type `git commit -m "Prepare volunteer hub handoff"` and press Enter. Then type `git log --oneline`, `git show --stat --oneline HEAD`, and `git status --short`, pressing Enter after each command.
try_module_3_sketch5.hint: Record the staged maintenance snapshot and audit the complete history.

help.concept: The same volunteer-hub repository now carries all three module-project milestones.
help.hint_2: The short status should be empty.

try_module_3_sketch5.solutionCode:
git commit -m "Prepare volunteer hub handoff"
git log --oneline
git show --stat --oneline HEAD
git status --short
try_module_3_sketch5.instructions: Type `git commit -m "Prepare volunteer hub handoff"` and press Enter. Then type `git log --oneline`, `git show --stat --oneline HEAD`, and `git status --short`, pressing Enter after each command.
